description_long: This is a compact, modern stapler with a sleek, angular design and a predominantly red exterior. The body is constructed from a hard, glossy plastic, with subtle black accents along the edges and at the hinge area. The upper arm is slightly beveled and tapers towards the front, while the lower arm is straight and flat, providing a stable base. The staple exit slot is located at the front underside, with a small metallic plate visible, indicating the staple ejection point. The overall form is minimalistic, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The stapler appears sturdy and functional, suitable for use in an office or urban workspace.
description: A sleek, red stapler with a glossy finish, angular contours, and black accent details. The design is modern and minimalistic, with a visible staple exit slot at the front.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the red stapler, highlighting its angular top and the black accent at the hinge.
description_view_1: Narrow end view showing the slim profile and the smooth, slightly beveled top surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the staple exit slot and metallic plate more visible at the front.
description_view_3: Front view showing the staple exit slot and the black and metallic details at the tip of the stapler.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is angular with a slightly beveled top, made of glossy red plastic. It is smooth to the touch, with no visible ergonomic patterns or texturing, and features a minimalistic, modern contour.
attribute_staple_exit_slot: The staple exit slot is located at the front underside of the stapler, rectangular in shape, and features a small metallic plate. It is clearly visible in the front and side views.
